body:
## Type

bug

## Target

skills/tau

## Target paths

- skills/tau

## Current state

A live 10-page pdf-lab second-pass run against NIST pages reached scillm but every attempted page returned HTTP 401 Invalid API key. Direct curl to http://localhost:4001/v1/scillm/auth with the documented sk-dev-proxy-123 key also returns 401, while http://localhost:4001/health is OK. The pdf_oxide runner has SCILLM_KEY = "sk-dev-proxy-123" hard-coded.

## Requested outcome

Tau-backed pdf-lab reviewer handoffs either source the active Scillm auth the same way Tau live workers do (env SCILLM_API_KEY/SCILLM_MASTER_KEY or docker scillm-proxy SCILLM_MASTER_KEY) or fail closed in preflight before spending per-page reviewer attempts. No hard-coded stale key should be used for live reviewer proof.

## Required proof

Required proof: a non-mocked rerun over the same 10-page packet writes scillm_preflight.json with auth HTTP 200, per-page response.raw.json without 401 auth failures, and a Tau/ticket proof comment naming mocked:false live:true plus the exact packet, response, and validation artifact paths. Current failing proof artifacts: /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/pages/page_0020/response.raw.json through page_0483/response.raw.json; direct auth check returned 401.

## Route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Maintainer route

backend_python_or_skill_runtime

## Requested repair agent

agent-skill-maintainer

## Non-goals

No unrelated refactors or scope expansion.

## Ticket type details

- **Observed failure:** A live 10-page pdf-lab second-pass run against NIST pages reached scillm but every attempted page returned HTTP 401 Invalid API key. Direct curl to http://localhost:4001/v1/scillm/auth with the documented sk-dev-proxy-123 key also returns 401, while http://localhost:4001/health is OK. The pdf_oxide runner has SCILLM_KEY = "sk-dev-proxy-123" hard-coded.
- **Expected behavior:** Tau-backed pdf-lab reviewer handoffs either source the active Scillm auth the same way Tau live workers do (env SCILLM_API_KEY/SCILLM_MASTER_KEY or docker scillm-proxy SCILLM_MASTER_KEY) or fail closed in preflight before spending per-page reviewer attempts. No hard-coded stale key should be used for live reviewer proof.
- **Reproduction or artifact:** Run /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py with packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet and pages 20 468 401 415 483 34 31 32 33 23; inspect live_second_pass_review/pages/page_0020/response.raw.json and sibling page response files.

<!-- ticket-skill
type: bug
target: skills/tau
route: backend_python_or_skill_runtime
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
-->

This ticket must be resolved under `best-practices-github-ticket`. Closure requires deterministic proof; WebGPT review or CI green alone is not closure proof.

comments.body:
<!-- agent-lease
agent: agent-skill-maintainer
lease_id: 20260630T140357Z-agent-skill-maintainer-70
issue: 70
-->

Lease: maintainer-active by agent-skill-maintainer.
Scope: one ticket.
Closure requirement: deterministic proof comment before close.

# Ticket #70 Proof: Tau/pdf-lab reviewer Scillm auth

Issue: https://github.com/grahama1970/agent-skills/issues/70

## Diagnosis

The failing artifact used a stale `sk-dev-proxy-123` auth path:

- Failing preflight: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/scillm_preflight.json`
- Failing page sample: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/pages/page_0020/response.raw.json`
- Observed failure: Scillm health returned OK, but auth and per-page calls returned HTTP 401.

The active docker `scillm-proxy` exposes a different `SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`; direct auth with that key returned HTTP 200.

## Patch

Patched checked-in pdf-lab skill code:

- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/agent-skills/skills/pdf-lab/lib/agentic_parts/part5.py`
- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/agent-skills/skills/pdf-lab/tests/test_scillm_auth_headers.py`

Behavior changed:

- Prefer `SCILLM_API_KEY`, `SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`, `LITELLM_MASTER_KEY`, `MASTER_KEY`.
- Fall back to docker `scillm-proxy` `SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`.
- Fall back to explicit `SCILLM_PROXY_KEY`.
- Fail closed with `RuntimeError` when no key is available.
- Do not silently use `sk-dev-proxy-123`.

## Live rerun

Command:

```bash
/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/.venv/bin/python \
  /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py \
  --packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet \
  --out /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405 \
  --pages 20 468 401 415 483 34 31 32 33 23 \
  --concurrency 1 \
  --retries 0 \
  --timeout 420 \
  --batch-id ticket70-scillm-auth-rerun-20260630T1405
```

Result:

- Exit code: 0
- `mocked: false`
- `live: true`
- Preflight auth HTTP status: 200
- Auth source: `docker:scillm-proxy:SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`
- Page count: 10
- Raw OK count: 10
- Validation OK count: 10
- HTTP 401 count across `response.raw.json`: 0

Artifacts:

- Packet: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet`
- Preflight: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/scillm_preflight.json`
- Summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/summary.json`
- Responses: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/pages/page_*/response.raw.json`
- Validations: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/pages/page_*/validation.json`

## Deterministic checks

```bash
uv run --project skills/pdf-lab pytest skills/pdf-lab/tests/test_scillm_auth_headers.py -q
```

Result: `3 passed in 0.06s`

```bash
uv run --project skills/pdf-lab python - <<'PY'
import lib.agentic as agentic
print(agentic._scillm_headers()["X-Caller-Skill"])
PY
```

Result: `pdf-lab`

```bash
python3 scripts/check_mock_evidence_claims.py
```

Result: `OK: checked 385 test file(s); no mock+proof claim violations`

```bash
rg -n "SCILLM_PROXY_KEY', 'sk-dev-proxy-123|SCILLM_PROXY_KEY\", \"sk-dev-proxy-123|Authorization.*sk-dev-proxy-123|SCILLM_KEY\\s*=\\s*\"sk-dev-proxy-123\"" skills/pdf-lab/lib skills/pdf-lab/tests
```

Result: no matches.

## Proof boundary

- `mocked: false` for the 10-page Scillm rerun.
- `live: true` for Scillm auth and per-page model calls.
- Unit tests are mocked/monkeypatched and prove auth resolution wiring only.
- This does not prove semantic correctness of the model reviews, final pdf-lab extraction quality, or unrelated pdf_oxide hard-coded auth paths outside the checked-in agent-skills pdf-lab skill patch.

# Ticket #70 Proof: Tau/pdf-lab reviewer Scillm auth

Issue: https://github.com/grahama1970/agent-skills/issues/70

## Diagnosis

The failing artifact used a stale `sk-dev-proxy-123` auth path:

- Failing preflight: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/scillm_preflight.json`
- Failing page sample: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/pages/page_0020/response.raw.json`

- `/home/graham/workspace/experiments/agent-skills/skills/pdf-lab/tests/test_scillm_auth_headers.py`

- Fall back to docker `scillm-proxy` `SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`.
- Fall back to explicit `SCILLM_PROXY_KEY`.

- Do not silently use `sk-dev-proxy-123`.

```bash
/home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/.venv/bin/python \
  /home/graham/workspace/experiments/pdf_oxide/scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py \
  --packet /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet \
  --out /mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405 \

  --concurrency 1 \

  --timeout 420 \
  --batch-id ticket70-scillm-auth-rerun-20260630T1405
```

Result:

- Exit code: 0
- `mocked: false`
- `live: true`
- Preflight auth HTTP status: 200
- Auth source: `docker:scillm-proxy:SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`
- Page count: 10
- Raw OK count: 10
- Validation OK count: 10

Artifacts:

- Packet: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/review_packet`
- Preflight: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/scillm_preflight.json`
- Summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/summary.json`
- Responses: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/pages/page_*/response.raw.json`
- Validations: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_ticket70_rerun_20260630T1405/pages/page_*/validation.json`

## Deterministic checks

```bash
uv run --project skills/pdf-lab pytest skills/pdf-lab/tests/test_scillm_auth_headers.py -q
```

Result: `3 passed in 0.06s`

```bash
uv run --project skills/pdf-lab python - <<'PY'
import lib.agentic as agentic
print(agentic._scillm_headers()["X-Caller-Skill"])
PY
```

Result: `pdf-lab`

```bash
python3 scripts/check_mock_evidence_claims.py
```

Result: `OK: checked 385 test file(s); no mock+proof claim violations`

```bash
rg -n "SCILLM_PROXY_KEY', 'sk-dev-proxy-123|SCILLM_PROXY_KEY\", \"sk-dev-proxy-123|Authorization.*sk-dev-proxy-123|SCILLM_KEY\\s*=\\s*\"sk-dev-proxy-123\"" skills/pdf-lab/lib skills/pdf-lab/tests
```

Result: no matches.

## Proof boundary

- `mocked: false` for the 10-page Scillm rerun.
- `live: true` for Scillm auth and per-page model calls.
- Unit tests are mocked/monkeypatched and prove auth resolution wiring only.
- This does not prove semantic correctness of the model reviews, final pdf-lab extraction quality, or unrelated pdf_oxide hard-coded auth paths outside the checked-in agent-skills pdf-lab skill patch.

Live evidence update, not closure.

mocked: no
live: yes

What was exercised:
- Ran the real pdf-lab second-pass reviewer against the 10-page NIST sample through the live Scillm proxy.
- The runner now performs a live `/v1/scillm/auth` preflight and sources the active key from the running `scillm-proxy` container instead of the stale hard-coded `sk-dev-proxy-123` value.

Evidence artifacts:
- Before auth repair: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review/pages/page_0020/response.raw.json` returned HTTP 401 `Invalid API key`.
- After auth repair: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_auth_fix/scillm_preflight.json`
- Post-table-patch rerun preflight: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch/scillm_preflight.json`
- Completed live rerun summary: `/mnt/storage12tb/pi-mono/artifacts/pdf-lab/ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630/live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch/summary.json`

Command result:
- `uv run python scripts/pdf_lab/run_next30_agentic_second_pass.py --packet .../review_packet --out .../live_second_pass_review_after_table_fp_patch --pages 20 468 401 415 483 34 31 32 33 23 --model gpt-5.5 --concurrency 1 --timeout 420 --retries 1 --batch-id ten-page-random-toc-elements-20260630-after-table-fp-patch`
- Exit code: 0
- Live preflight auth status: 200
- Auth source: `docker:scillm-proxy:SCILLM_MASTER_KEY`
- All 10 pages produced `raw_ok:true` reviewer responses.

What remains unverified:
- This does not prove semantic convergence for the 10 pages. The latest live summary still reports 16 reviewer findings.
- This does not prove the same auth path is wired into any other pdf-lab or Tau command.

labels.name: route:backend_python_or_skill_runtime
labels.description: Maintainer route: backend Python or skill runtime

title: Tau/pdf-lab reviewer must fail closed or source live Scillm auth
